examples: Don't get in a strop —I'm only a few minutes late.
Against the strop, the familiar rasp of his voice.
I rolled up my shirtsleeves and picked up the razor strop.
Pedro Strop then gave up two runs in the 10th to complete the collapse.
In the 10th, Ichiro Suzuki led off with a double off Strop (0-2) and Vernon Wells followed with an RBI double to left.
